event: Small-town street scene with arriving figure
description: A narrow street in a German medieval town with tall buildings flanking both sides. A round stone tower with a conical roof rises in the background. In the foreground, a soldier or watchman in a dark uniform and tall hat stands at center. To the right, an elderly man sits reading a newspaper under an awning. A woman in period dress walks with a small child in the background. A small dog sits in the street. The scene is rendered in warm golden tones with careful attention to architectural detail, capturing the quiet life of a small town.
